name: ExtensionRequirements_Experimental
title: R5: For testing purposes, not real usage (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `Requirements.experimental` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`Requirements.experimental` 0..1 `boolean`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
* R5 `Requirements.experimental` 0..1 `boolean`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `Requirements.experimental` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Requirements` is not mapped.
Element `Requirements.experimental` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: For testing purposes, not real usage (new)
element.comment:
Element `Requirements.experimental` is not mapped to FHIR R4, since FHIR R5 `Requirements` is not mapped.
Element `Requirements.experimental` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).
Allows filtering of Requirements that are appropriate for use versus not.

element.short: For testing purposes, not real usage
element.definition: A Boolean value to indicate that this Requirements is authored for testing purposes (or education/evaluation/marketing) and is not intended to be used for genuine usage.
element.comment: Allows filtering of Requirements that are appropriate for use versus not.
